name: Jambalaya with Pork Loin
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Teaspoon Cayenne Pepper or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bacon into small cubes and brown in oil.
2. Add vegetables and cook until slightly softened.
3. Add rice and spices; stir to combine and let brown for about 1 minute.
4. Pour in chicken bouillon, mix well, and bring to a boil.
5. Cover and simmer for approximately 15 minutes.
6. Trim pork loin of excess fat and cut into thin strips (about 1 1/2 inches).
7. Add the pork strips to the rice mixture and continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes.
8. Remove from heat, let stand for 3-4 minutes, then garnish with fresh dill if desired.
